title: Simple Backpack
description: Configurable backpacks with team support, admin tools, and live config reload for 1.20+
body:
🎒 SimpleBackpack

Persistent, configurable player backpacks with a clean vanilla-style GUI.
A modern, feature-rich backpack system for Minecraft 1.20 – 1.21+, supporting Paper, Spigot, Bukkit & Purpur.

✨ Features
🧳 Personal Backpacks

Each player gets their own persistent backpack

Adjustable size, name, and color

Clean and intuitive vanilla-style GUI

Fully compatible with previous storage versions

👥 Team Backpacks

Create teams, invite players, and share a common team backpack

Simple commands: /invite, /team, /leave

Perfect for cooperative servers and clans

🎮 Classic Mode

Minimalistic mode that disables all extended features

Only /backpack and /bp remain active

Ideal for lightweight or survival-focused servers

🛠️ Admin Tools

Admin overview GUI

Insert items into any player's backpack

Enable/disable all backpacks globally

Live config reload (/backpackreload)

Optional audit logging

Dedicated admin features via /backpackadmin

⚙️ Live Configuration GUI

Change size, color, and options in-game

All changes apply instantly without restarts

Fully configurable through config.yml

Perfect for servers that tweak gameplay on the fly

🌍 Multi-Language Support

Includes English 🇬🇧 and German 🇩🇪

All messages are fully editable

Auto-detection based on player locale (optional)

💾 Improved Data Handling

Persistent YAML storage

Async saving for maximum performance

No data loss during updates

Compatible with older SimpleBackpack data formats

🧩 Compatibility

Platforms: Paper, Spigot, Bukkit, Purpur

Minecraft versions: 1.20 – 1.21+

Compiled against: Paper API 1.21.10

plugin.yml api-version: 1.21

Fully supports servers running both 1.20.x and 1.21.x

🧭 Commands
Command	Description
/backpack, /bp	Open your personal backpack
/backpackconfig	Open the configuration GUI
/backpackreload	Reload plugin configuration
/invite <player>	Invite a player to your team
/team	Show your team members
/leave	Leave your team
/backpackadmin gui	Open the admin overview GUI
/backpackshare <player> [minutes]	Temporarily share your backpack
🔑 Permissions
Permission	Description	Default
simplebackpack.use	Use /backpack and /bp	true
simplebackpack.config	Access /backpackconfig	op
simplebackpack.reload	Reload configuration	op
simplebackpack.team	Use team commands	true
simplebackpack.team.invite	Invite players	true
simplebackpack.team.leave	Leave team	true
simplebackpack.admin	Use admin commands	op

👤 Author: vwtfafa
📦 Supports: Paper • Spigot • Bukkit • Purpur
🧱 Minecraft: 1.20 – 1.21+
